personal.preferred_title: Monitoring & APM Engineer | Dynatrace, Enterprise Observability & Telemetry Platforms

summary: Monitoring and APM Engineer with deep experience in enterprise observability platforms including Dynatrace, BMC TrueSight, and CA APM. Specialized in building telemetry pipelines, dashboards, alerts, and thresholds to improve incident detection and reduce MTTR. Strong background in Python-based automation, large-scale monitoring environments, and cross-team operational support.

experience.title: Data Engineer / Capacity Data Engineering - CITI
bullets: Built and maintained telemetry data pipelines ingesting monitoring data from 6,000+ endpoints (TrueSight/TSCO), enabling enterprise-scale observability.
Integrated multiple monitoring platforms (TrueSight, CA Wily, AppDynamics) into unified reporting layers to improve early issue detection.
Developed dashboards and alerting strategies to support incident management and operational readiness.
Automated reporting and monitoring workflows using Python, improving reliability and reducing manual intervention.
Supported capacity and performance monitoring across large-scale distributed infrastructure.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Synthetic Monitoring across critical production systems.
Implemented end-user monitoring (EUM) and transaction tracing across web and mobile platforms.
Led monitoring improvements through real-user data analysis (Gomez), enabling performance optimization.
Performed Dynatrace upgrade (6.5 → 7.0) with zero production impact.

experience.title: CA APM Consultant
bullets: Managed enterprise CA APM environments (4,000–6,000 agents).
Designed dashboards, alerts, and SLA thresholds for monitoring standardization.
Built automation scripts (Perl/Ksh) for monitoring data extraction and reporting.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Monitoring & APM: Dynatrace (AppMon, Synthetics), BMC TrueSight/TSCO, CA APM/Introscope, AppDynamics
skills.Languages: Python, SQL, Perl, Ksh, Java, C++
skills.Data & Automation: Telemetry Pipelines, ETL, Data Warehousing, PySpark

projects.name: FAST Project (Dynatrace)
projects.description: Led monitoring optimization through real-user data analysis (Gomez), improving operational visibility and supporting performance-focused engineering decisions.

projects.name: HorizonScale — Telemetry Analytics Platform
projects.description: Developed Python/PySpark telemetry analytics pipelines and dashboards to improve speed and consistency of capacity and performance monitoring workflows.
